description: A central sector scheme to provide financial assistance to all landholding farmers families.
eligibilityCriteria: All landholding farmers families are eligible.
incomeLimit: Excludes income tax payers in last assessment year.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each.
documentsRequired: Aadhaar Card:Mandatory identity proof|Land Records:Proof of land ownership|Bank Passbook:For direct benefit transfer
applicationProcess: Register online at PM-Kisan portal or visit nearest CSC.

ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: The world's largest health insurance scheme providing a cover of ₹5 lakhs per family.
eligibilityCriteria: Families identified by SECC 2011 data based on deprivation and occupational criteria.
incomeLimit: Low income families as per SECC 2011.
benefits: Cashless treatment in empanelled hospitals up to ₹5 Lakhs per year.
documentsRequired: Aadhaar Card:Identity proof|Ration Card:Family identification|PMJAY ID/Letter:Eligibility proof
applicationProcess: Check eligibility on portal, visit empanelled hospital.

description: Investment support scheme to agriculture and horticulture crops.
eligibilityCriteria: All farmers holding land in Telangana.
incomeLimit: No specific income limit, but must own agriculture land.
documentsRequired: Aadhaar Card:Proof of ID|Pattadar Passbook:Proof of Land
applicationProcess: Apply through local Agricultural Extension Officer.
